project_type: AWS CDK construct library (L3 constructs for serverless apps) managed by projen
build_system: projen (npm run build triggers projen build which does: default, pre-compile, compile, post-compile, test, package)
test_framework: jest with ts-jest, tests in test/ directory, uses aws-cdk-lib assertions (Template.fromStack), mocks LambdaFunction to avoid bundling
verification_instructions: 1) npm install, 2) npx projen compile (TypeScript compilation), 3) npx jest --passWithNoTests (run unit tests)
environment_constraints: Open internet - can install packages. Node.js available. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: Standard projen project. Do not edit generated files. PR against main.
key_patterns: RestApi construct loads OpenAPI yaml, patches it with x-amazon-apigateway-integration for Lambda proxy, uses patchSecurity to move global security to per-operation. Tests mock LambdaFunction (NodejsFunction) with plain aws_lambda.Function to avoid esbuild bundling. Authentication can be ICognitoAuthentication (has userpool: IUserPool) or IJwtAuthentication (has issuerUrl, audience?, jwksUrl?).
directory_structure: src/constructs/ - CDK constructs (RestApi, BaseApi, authentication, func), src/lambda/ - Lambda runtime code (auth, handler, errors), test/ - jest tests, test/util/ - test utilities
